setting: Two friends catching up over coffee.
lyrics:
For all the times that you rained on my parade
And all the clubs you get in using my name
You think you broke my heart, oh girl for goodness sake!
You think I'm crying on my own, well I ain't

And I didn't wanna write a song
'Cause I didn't want anyone thinking I still care
I don't but, you still hit my phone up
And baby I'll be movin' on
And I think it should be somethin'
That I don't wanna hold back
Maybe you should know that

My mama don't like you and she likes everyone
And I never like to admit that I was wrong
And I've been so caught up in my job,
Didn't see what's going on
But now I know, I'm better sleeping on my own

'Cause if you like the way you look that much
Oh baby you should go and love yourself
And if you think that I'm still holdin' on to somethin'
You should go and love yourself

But when you told me that you hated my friends
The only problem was with you and not them
And every time you told me my opinion was wrong
And tried to make me forget where I came from

And I didn't wanna write a song
'Cause I didn't want anyone thinking I still care
I don't but, you still hit my phone up
And baby I'll be movin' on
And I think it should be somethin'
That I don't wanna hold back
Maybe you should know that

My mama don't like you and she likes everyone
And I never like to admit that I was wrong
And I've been so caught up in my job
Didn't see what's going on
And now I know, I'm better sleeping on my own

'Cause if you like the way you look that much
Oh baby you should go and love yourself
And if you think that I'm still holdin' on to somethin'
You should go and love yourself

For all the times that you made me feel small
I fell in love, now I feel nothin' at all
I never felt so low when I was vulnerable
Was I a fool to let you break down my walls?

'Cause if you like the way you look that much
Oh baby you should go and love yourself
And if you think that I'm still holdin' on to somethin'
You should go and love yourself

'Cause if you like the way you look that much
Oh baby you should go and love yourself
And if you think that I'm still holdin' on to somethin'
You should go and love yourself
lyricsJa:
僕の晴れ舞台を いつも台無しにして
僕の名前使い クラブに入り込んだ
僕の心壊したって？ 馬鹿げてるよ
一人で泣いてるって？ まさか、そんな

歌なんて書きたくなかったんだ
だってまだ未練があるなんて 思われたくなかったから
気にしてないのに 君はまだ電話してくる
もう僕は先に進むよ
もう隠したくない 気持ちがあるんだ
知っておくべきだね

ママは君が嫌い みんな好きなのに
間違ってたなんて 認めたくないけど
仕事に夢中で 何も見てなかった
でも今ならわかる 一人で寝る方がずっとマシ

だってそんなに 自分のこと好きなら
ベイビー 自分のこと愛せばいいさ
もし僕がまだ何か 引きずってると思ってるなら
自分のこと愛せばいいさ

でも友達を嫌いだって 君が言った時
問題は君にあって 彼らじゃなかった
僕の意見はいつも 間違ってるって言ったね
僕のルーツ忘れさせようとした

歌なんて書きたくなかったんだ
だってまだ未練があるなんて 思われたくなかったから
気にしてないのに 君はまだ電話してくる
もう僕は先に進むよ
もう隠したくない 気持ちがあるんだ
知っておくべきだね

ママは君が嫌い みんな好きなのに
間違ってたなんて 認めたくないけど
仕事に夢中で 何も見てなかった
でも今ならわかる 一人で寝る方がずっとマシ

だってそんなに 自分のこと好きなら
ベイビー 自分のこと愛せばいいさ
もし僕がまだ何か 引きずってると思ってるなら
自分のこと愛せばいいさ

いつも僕をみじめにさせたこと
恋に落ちたけど もう何も感じない
弱かった時 こんなに落ち込んだことなかった
僕の壁を壊させたなんて 馬鹿だったかな

だってそんなに 自分のこと好きなら
ベイビー 自分のこと愛せばいいさ
もし僕がまだ何か 引きずってると思ってるなら
自分のこと愛せばいいさ

だってそんなに 自分のこと好きなら

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Hey Sarah, how have you been?
sentences.displayHtml: Hey Sarah, how have you been?

sentences.text: I feel like I'm finally movin' on from everything.
sentences.displayHtml: I feel like I'm finally movin' on from everything.

conversation.japanese: やあ、サラ、元気にしてた？やっと色々なことから前に進んでいる気がするよ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: I was a little worried you were still holding on to things.
sentences.displayHtml: I was a little worried you were still holding on to things.

conversation.japanese: マーク、それを聞いてよかった！まだ色々なことにしがみついているんじゃないかと思って、少し心配してたの。実際どう感じてる？

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I realized I was so caught up in the drama, I didn't see what was really going on.
sentences.displayHtml: I realized I was so caught up in the drama, I didn't see what was really going on.

sentences.text: Now I know I'm better sleeping on my own.
sentences.displayHtml: Now I know I'm better sleeping on my own.

conversation.japanese: 正直、だいぶ良くなったよ。あのドラマに巻き込まれて、何が本当に起こっているか見えてなかったって気づいたんだ。今じゃ一人で寝る方がずっといいって分かるよ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: It's important to love yourself first.
sentences.displayHtml: It's important to love yourself first.

sentences.text: Remember when you used to complain about him raining on your parade?
sentences.displayHtml: Remember when you used to complain about him raining on your parade?

conversation.japanese: よかったわね！まず自分を愛することが大切よ。彼がいつもあなたのお楽しみを台無しにするって愚痴ってたの覚えてる？

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I guess my opinion was wrong about him back then.
sentences.displayHtml: I guess my opinion was wrong about him back then.

sentences.text: Now I just want to not hold back anymore.
sentences.displayHtml: Now I just want to not hold back anymore.

conversation.japanese: はは、うん。あの頃の彼に対する僕の考えは間違ってたみたいだね。もうこれ以上遠慮したくないんだ。
